## TestServiceOverrides\.RemoveDaprHealthChecks\(IServiceCollection\) Method

Removes all Dapr health check registrations that require a running sidecar\.
Call this in WebApplicationFactory tests where no Dapr sidecar is available\.

```csharp
public static void RemoveDaprHealthChecks(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection services);
```
